    schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode

    (s.AvgScrMath + s.AvgScrRead + s.AvgScrWrite) = (

SELECT account_id
FROM account
WHERE account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM disp
    WHERE client_id IN (
        SELECT client_id
        FROM client

        AND birth_date = (
            SELECT MIN(birth_date)
            FROM client
            WHERE gender = 'F'
        )
        AND district_id IN (
            SELECT district_id
            FROM district
            WHERE A11 = (
                SELECT MIN(A11)
                FROM district
            )
        )
    )
)

    )) AS percentage_faster

    SELECT

SELECT
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%'))
    -
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%')) AS SME_LAM_Diff,

    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%'))
    -
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%')) AS LAM_KAM_Diff,

    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%'))
    -
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date LIKE '2013%')) AS KAM_SME_Diff	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
SELECT
    c.Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionIncrease,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM
    yearmonth y
JOIN
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY
    c.Segment
ORDER BY
    PercentageIncrease DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
